���������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������public/���������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������0000775�0000000�0000000�00000000000�15166042467�0012347�5����������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������ustar�00root����������������������������root����������������������������0000000�0000000������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������public/index.html�����������������������������������������������������������������������������������0000664�0000000�0000000�00000154747�15166042467�0014366�0����������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������ustar�00root����������������������������root����������������������������0000000�0000000������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������������<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>Restore Wizard</title>
  <style>
    :root {
      --bg: #0f1117;
      --surface: #1a1d27;
      --surface2: #242736;
      --border: #2e3144;
      --text: #e4e4e7;
      --text-muted: #9ca3af;
      --primary: #6366f1;
      --primary-hover: #818cf8;
      --danger: #ef4444;
      --success: #22c55e;
      --warning: #f59e0b;
    }
    * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
    body {
      font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif;
      background: var(--bg);
      color: var(--text);
      height: 100vh;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    /* Header */
    .header {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      padding: 0 20px;
      height: 52px;
      background: var(--surface);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .header-left { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; }
    .header h1 { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.01em; }
    .status-indicators { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; }
    .status-chip {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--text-muted);
      background: var(--surface2);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 20px;
      padding: 3px 10px;
    }
    .dot { width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%; }
    .dot.ok { background: var(--success); box-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(34,197,94,0.5); }
    .dot.error { background: var(--danger); box-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(239,68,68,0.5); }
    .dot.unknown { background: var(--text-muted); }
    .dot.loading { background: var(--warning); animation: pulse 1.5s infinite; }
    @keyframes pulse { 0%,100%{opacity:1} 50%{opacity:0.4} }
    .header-right { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted); }
    .header-right a { color: var(--text-muted); text-decoration: none; }
    .header-right a:hover { color: var(--text); }

    /* Tabs */
    .tabs {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 2px;
      padding: 0 20px;
      background: var(--surface);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .tab-btn {
      padding: 10px 16px;
      font-size: 13px;
      font-weight: 500;
      color: var(--text-muted);
      background: none;
      border: none;
      border-bottom: 2px solid transparent;
      cursor: pointer;
      margin-bottom: -1px;
      transition: color 0.15s;
    }
    .tab-btn:hover { color: var(--text); }
    .tab-btn.active { color: var(--primary); border-bottom-color: var(--primary); }
    .tab-badge {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      width: 18px;
      height: 18px;
      background: var(--primary);
      border-radius: 9px;
      font-size: 10px;
      color: white;
      margin-left: 6px;
      font-weight: 600;
    }

    /* Main content */
    .content {
      flex: 1;
      overflow-y: auto;
      padding: 24px;
    }

    /* Cards / sections */
    .section { margin-bottom: 28px; }
    .section-title {
      font-size: 11px;
      font-weight: 600;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.07em;
      color: var(--text-muted);
      margin-bottom: 12px;
    }
    .card {
      background: var(--surface);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 8px;
      padding: 16px;
    }
    .card-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr));
      gap: 12px;
    }
    .stat-card {
      background: var(--surface);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 8px;
      padding: 16px 20px;
    }
    .stat-card-label { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 6px; }
    .stat-card-value { font-size: 22px; font-weight: 600; }
    .stat-card-sub { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 4px; }

    /* Tables */
    .table-wrap { overflow-x: auto; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid var(--border); }
    table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 13px; }
    thead { background: var(--surface2); }
    th {
      padding: 10px 14px;
      text-align: left;
      font-size: 11px;
      font-weight: 600;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.05em;
      color: var(--text-muted);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    }
    td { padding: 11px 14px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); vertical-align: middle; }
    tr:last-child td { border-bottom: none; }
    tr.clickable:hover td { background: var(--surface2); cursor: pointer; }
    .mono { font-family: 'SF Mono', 'Fira Code', monospace; font-size: 12px; }
    .badge {
      display: inline-block;
      padding: 2px 8px;
      border-radius: 4px;
      font-size: 11px;
      font-weight: 500;
    }
    .badge-blue { background: rgba(99,102,241,0.2); color: #818cf8; }
    .badge-green { background: rgba(34,197,94,0.15); color: var(--success); }
    .badge-red { background: rgba(239,68,68,0.15); color: var(--danger); }
    .badge-yellow { background: rgba(245,158,11,0.15); color: var(--warning); }
    .badge-gray { background: rgba(156,163,175,0.15); color: var(--text-muted); }
    .badge-purple { background: rgba(167,139,250,0.2); color: #a78bfa; }

    /* Buttons */
    .btn {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
      padding: 6px 14px;
      border-radius: 6px;
      border: none;
      font-size: 13px;
      font-weight: 500;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: opacity 0.15s;
    }
    .btn:hover { opacity: 0.85; }
    .btn:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }
    .btn-primary { background: var(--primary); color: white; }
    .btn-danger { background: var(--danger); color: white; }
    .btn-ghost { background: var(--surface2); color: var(--text); border: 1px solid var(--border); }
    .btn-sm { padding: 4px 10px; font-size: 12px; }
    .btn-icon { padding: 6px 8px; }

    /* Filter pills */
    .filter-pills { display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 14px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
    .pill {
      padding: 5px 14px;
      border-radius: 20px;
      font-size: 12px;
      font-weight: 500;
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      background: var(--surface2);
      color: var(--text-muted);
      cursor: pointer;
    }
    .pill.active { background: var(--primary); border-color: var(--primary); color: white; }
    .pill:hover:not(.active) { border-color: var(--primary); color: var(--text); }

    /* Empty state */
    .empty {
      text-align: center;
      padding: 48px 20px;
      color: var(--text-muted);
      font-size: 14px;
    }
    .empty-icon { font-size: 36px; margin-bottom: 12px; }

    /* Loading spinner */
    .spinner {
      width: 20px; height: 20px;
      border: 2px solid var(--border);
      border-top-color: var(--primary);
      border-radius: 50%;
      animation: spin 0.7s linear infinite;
      display: inline-block;
    }
    @keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }

    /* Modal */
    .modal-overlay {
      position: fixed;
      inset: 0;
      background: rgba(0,0,0,0.7);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      z-index: 100;
    }
    .modal {
      background: var(--surface);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 12px;
      width: 90%;
      max-width: 680px;
      max-height: 85vh;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
    }
    .modal-header {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      padding: 16px 20px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .modal-header h2 { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; }
    .modal-body { padding: 20px; overflow-y: auto; flex: 1; }
    .modal-footer { padding: 16px 20px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); display: flex; gap: 10px; justify-content: flex-end; flex-shrink: 0; }
    .close-btn { background: none; border: none; color: var(--text-muted); cursor: pointer; font-size: 20px; padding: 2px 6px; }
    .close-btn:hover { color: var(--text); }

    /* Warning box */
    .warning-box {
      background: rgba(245,158,11,0.1);
      border: 1px solid rgba(245,158,11,0.3);
      border-radius: 6px;
      padding: 12px 14px;
      font-size: 13px;
      color: var(--warning);
      margin-bottom: 16px;
    }
    .danger-box {
      background: rgba(239,68,68,0.1);
      border: 1px solid rgba(239,68,68,0.3);
      border-radius: 6px;
      padding: 12px 14px;
      font-size: 13px;
      color: var(--danger);
      margin-bottom: 16px;
    }
    .success-box {
      background: rgba(34,197,94,0.1);
      border: 1px solid rgba(34,197,94,0.3);
      border-radius: 6px;
      padding: 12px 14px;
      font-size: 13px;
      color: var(--success);
      margin-bottom: 16px;
    }

    /* Form fields */
    .field { margin-bottom: 14px; }
    .field label { display: block; font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 6px; }
    .field select, .field input {
      width: 100%;
      padding: 9px 12px;
      background: var(--bg);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 6px;
      color: var(--text);
      font-size: 13px;
      outline: none;
    }
    .field select:focus, .field input:focus { border-color: var(--primary); }

    /* File browser */
    .file-tree { font-size: 13px; }
    .file-item {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
      padding: 6px 8px;
      border-radius: 4px;
      cursor: pointer;
    }
    .file-item:hover { background: var(--surface2); }
    .file-icon { width: 16px; text-align: center; flex-shrink: 0; color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 12px; }
    .file-name { flex: 1; }
    .file-size { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-muted); flex-shrink: 0; }
    .breadcrumb { display: flex; gap: 4px; align-items: center; font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 12px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
    .breadcrumb span { cursor: pointer; }
    .breadcrumb span:hover { color: var(--primary); }
    .breadcrumb .sep { color: var(--border); }

    /* AI Chat tab */
    .chat-layout { display: flex; gap: 16px; height: calc(100vh - 140px); }
    .chat-sidebar { width: 200px; flex-shrink: 0; }
    .chat-sidebar-section { margin-bottom: 16px; }
    .chat-sidebar h3 { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.07em; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 8px; }
    .chat-quick-btn {
      display: block;
      width: 100%;
      padding: 7px 10px;
      margin: 3px 0;
      background: var(--surface2);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 5px;
      color: var(--text-muted);
      font-size: 12px;
      cursor: pointer;
      text-align: left;
    }
    .chat-quick-btn:hover { color: var(--text); border-color: var(--primary); }
    .chat-main { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden; }
    .chat-messages { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; padding: 16px; }
    .message { max-width: 760px; margin: 0 auto 12px; padding: 10px 14px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.6; }
    .message.user { background: var(--primary); color: white; margin-left: auto; max-width: 560px; border-radius: 8px 8px 2px 8px; }
    .message.assistant { background: var(--surface2); border: 1px solid var(--border); }
    .message.system { background: transparent; color: var(--text-muted); text-align: center; font-size: 12px; padding: 24px; }
    .message pre { background: var(--bg); padding: 10px; border-radius: 4px; overflow-x: auto; margin: 8px 0; font-size: 12px; }
    .message code { font-family: 'SF Mono', 'Fira Code', monospace; font-size: 12px; }
    .proposal { background: var(--surface2); border: 1px solid var(--warning); border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 14px; margin: 8px 0; max-width: 760px; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; }
    .proposal-header { color: var(--warning); font-weight: 600; font-size: 12px; margin-bottom: 6px; }
    .proposal-desc { font-size: 13px; margin-bottom: 8px; }
    .proposal-warn { font-size: 12px; color: var(--danger); background: rgba(239,68,68,0.1); padding: 6px 8px; border-radius: 4px; margin-bottom: 8px; }
    .proposal-btns { display: flex; gap: 8px; }
    .typing { display: flex; gap: 4px; padding: 4px 0; }
    .typing span { width: 6px; height: 6px; background: var(--text-muted); border-radius: 50%; animation: bounce 1.2s infinite; }
    .typing span:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.2s; }
    .typing span:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.4s; }
    @keyframes bounce { 0%,80%,100%{transform:translateY(0)} 40%{transform:translateY(-6px)} }
    .chat-input-bar { padding: 12px 16px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); display: flex; gap: 10px; }
    .chat-input-bar input { flex: 1; padding: 9px 12px; background: var(--bg); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 6px; color: var(--text); font-size: 13px; outline: none; }
    .chat-input-bar input:focus { border-color: var(--primary); }
    .model-select { background: var(--surface2); color: var(--text); border: 1px solid var(--border); padding: 5px 8px; border-radius: 5px; font-size: 12px; }

    /* Restore section cards */
    .restore-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 16px; }
    .restore-card { background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 8px; padding: 20px; }
    .restore-card h3 { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 4px; }
    .restore-card p { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 16px; }
    .restore-card-icon { font-size: 22px; margin-bottom: 10px; }

    /* Container status */
    .container-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(240px, 1fr)); gap: 10px; }
    .container-card { background: var(--surface2); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 6px; padding: 12px; }
    .container-name { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 4px; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }
    .container-status-text { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-muted); }

    /* Op status indicators */
    .op-status { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; }
    .op-status-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; }

    /* Scrollbar */
    ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 6px; height: 6px; }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: transparent; }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--border); border-radius: 3px; }

    /* Responsive */
    @media (max-width: 640px) {
      .chat-sidebar { display: none; }
      .restore-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
<div id="app"></div>

<!-- Modal container -->
<div id="modal-root"></div>

<script>
// ─── State ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const S = {
  user: null,
  tab: 'dashboard',
  // Dashboard
  status: null,
  health: null,          // backend-computed health model
  healthLoading: false,
  operations: [],
  containers: [],
  dashLoading: false,
  // Snapshots
  snapshots: [],
  snapsLoading: false,
  planFilter: 'all',
  // Repos
  repos: [],
  repoId: null,
  // Chat
  messages: [],
  chatLoading: false,
  models: [],
  selectedModel: localStorage.getItem('selectedModel') || '',
};

// ─── Helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
async function api(path, opts = {}) {
  const res = await fetch(path, {
    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    ...opts,
    body: opts.body ? JSON.stringify(opts.body) : undefined,
  });
  if (!res.ok) {
    const t = await res.text();
    throw new Error(t || res.statusText);
  }
  return res.json();
}

// Safely extract snapshots array from various possible response shapes
function parseSnapshots(data) {
  if (Array.isArray(data)) return data;
  if (data && typeof data === 'object') {
    // Try common keys
    if (Array.isArray(data.snapshots)) return data.snapshots;
    if (Array.isArray(data.items)) return data.items;
    if (Array.isArray(data.results)) return data.results;
    if (Array.isArray(data.data)) return data.data;
    // If it's an object with a single snapshot entry, wrap it
    if (data.snapshot) return [data.snapshot];
  }
  return [];
}

function fmtBytes(b) {
  if (!b) return '—';
  b = parseInt(b);
  if (b < 1024) return b + ' B';
  if (b < 1024 * 1024) return (b / 1024).toFixed(1) + ' KB';
  if (b < 1024 * 1024 * 1024) return (b / 1024 / 1024).toFixed(1) + ' MB';
  return (b / 1024 / 1024 / 1024).toFixed(2) + ' GB';
}

function fmtTime(ms) {
  if (!ms) return '—';
  const d = new Date(typeof ms === 'string' ? parseInt(ms) : ms);
  return d.toLocaleString(undefined, { month: 'short', day: 'numeric', hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' });
}

function timeAgo(ms) {
  if (!ms) return '—';
  const diff = Date.now() - (typeof ms === 'string' ? parseInt(ms) : ms);
  const m = Math.floor(diff / 60000);
  if (m < 1) return 'just now';
  if (m < 60) return m + 'm ago';
  const h = Math.floor(m / 60);
  if (h < 24) return h + 'h ago';
  return Math.floor(h / 24) + 'd ago';
}

function esc(s) {
  return String(s || '').replace(/&/g,'&').replace(/</g,'<').replace(/>/g,'>').replace(/"/g,'"');
}

function planBadge(tags) {
  const plans = { 'coolify-config': ['badge-blue','Config'], 'docker-volumes': ['badge-purple','Volumes'], 'db-dumps': ['badge-green','DB Dumps'] };
  if (!tags) return '<span class="badge badge-gray">unknown</span>';
  for (const [key, [cls, label]] of Object.entries(plans)) {
    if (tags.some(t => t.includes(key))) return `<span class="badge ${cls}">${label}</span>`;
  }
  return '<span class="badge badge-gray">unknown</span>';
}

function planFromTags(tags) {
  if (!tags) return 'unknown';
  if (tags.some(t => t.includes('coolify-config'))) return 'coolify-config';
  if (tags.some(t => t.includes('docker-volumes'))) return 'docker-volumes';
  if (tags.some(t => t.includes('db-dumps'))) return 'db-dumps';
  return 'unknown';
}

function opStatusHTML(op) {
  const s = op.status || op.operationStatus || '';
  if (s === 'STATUS_SUCCESS') return '<span class="badge badge-green">OK</span>';
  if (s === 'STATUS_ERROR') return '<span class="badge badge-red">Error</span>';
  if (s === 'STATUS_INPROGRESS') return '<span class="badge badge-yellow">Running</span>';
  return `<span class="badge badge-gray">${esc(s.replace('STATUS_',''))}</span>`;
}

function opTypeLabel(op) {
  const t = op.op || op.type || '';
  if (t.includes('backup') || t === 'OP_BACKUP') return 'Backup';
  if (t.includes('restore') || t === 'OP_RESTORE') return 'Restore';
  if (t.includes('prune') || t === 'OP_PRUNE') return 'Prune';
  if (t.includes('forget') || t === 'OP_FORGET') return 'Forget';
  return t.replace('OP_','') || '—';
}

function renderMsg(content) {
  if (!content) return '';
  return esc(content)
    .replace(/```(\w*)\n([\s\S]*?)```/g, '<pre><code>$2</code></pre>')
    .replace(/`([^`]+)`/g, '<code>$1</code>')
    .replace(/\*\*(.+?)\*\*/g, '<strong>$1</strong>')
    .replace(/\n/g, '<br>');
}

// ─── Data loading ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
async function loadStatus() {
  try {
    const data = await api('/api/status');
    S.status = data;
    renderHeader();
  } catch (e) {
    S.status = { error: e.message };
    renderHeader();
  }
}

async function loadHealth() {
  S.healthLoading = true;
  renderTabContent();
  try {
    const data = await api('/api/health');
    S.health = data;
  } catch (e) {
    S.health = { error: e.message, overall: 'unknown' };
  }
  S.healthLoading = false;
  renderHeader();
  renderTabContent();
}

async function loadRepos() {
  try {
    const data = await api('/api/repos');
    S.repos = data.repos || [];
    if (!S.repoId && S.repos.length) {
      S.repoId = S.repos[0].id;
    }
  } catch (e) {
    S.repos = [];
  }
}

async function loadDashboard() {
  S.dashLoading = true;
  renderTabContent();
  try {
    await loadRepos();
    const repo = S.repoId || 'do-spaces-backup';
    const [ops, ctrs, snaps] = await Promise.allSettled([
      api('/api/operations'),
      api('/api/containers'),
      api(`/api/snapshots?repo=${encodeURIComponent(repo)}`),
    ]);
    S.operations = ops.status === 'fulfilled' ? (ops.value.operations || ops.value || []) : [];
    S.containers = ctrs.status === 'fulfilled' ? (ctrs.value.containers || []) : [];
    S.snapshots = snaps.status === 'fulfilled' ? parseSnapshots(snaps.value) : [];
  } catch (e) {}
  S.dashLoading = false;
  renderTabContent();
}

async function loadSnapshots() {
  S.snapsLoading = true;
  renderTabContent();
  try {
    if (!S.repoId) await loadRepos();
    const repo = S.repoId || 'do-spaces-backup';
    const data = await api(`/api/snapshots?repo=${encodeURIComponent(repo)}`);
    S.snapshots = parseSnapshots(data);
  } catch (e) {
    S.snapshots = [];
  }
  S.snapsLoading = false;
  renderTabContent();
}

async function loadModels() {
  try {
    const data = await api('/api/models');
    S.models = data.available || [];
    if (!S.selectedModel) S.selectedModel = data.default;
  } catch (e) {}
}

// ─── Actions ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
async function executeAction(action, params, onDone) {
  try {
    const result = await api('/api/execute', { method: 'POST', body: { action, params } });
    onDone(null, result);
  } catch (e) {
    onDone(e, null);
  }
}

async function sendChatMessage(text) {
  if (!text.trim() || S.chatLoading) return;
  S.messages.push({ role: 'user', content: text });
  S.chatLoading = true;
  renderTabContent();
  scrollChat();
  try {
    const data = await api('/api/chat', {
      method: 'POST',
      body: { messages: S.messages.map(m => ({ role: m.role, content: m.content })), model: S.selectedModel },
    });
    if (data.error) {
      S.messages.push({ role: 'assistant', content: 'Error: ' + data.error });
    } else {
      S.messages.push({ role: 'assistant', content: data.message, proposals: data.proposals || [] });
    }
  } catch (e) {
    S.messages.push({ role: 'assistant', content: 'Connection error: ' + e.message });
  }
  S.chatLoading = false;
  renderTabContent();
  scrollChat();
}

function scrollChat() {
  requestAnimationFrame(() => {
    const el = document.querySelector('.chat-messages');
    if (el) el.scrollTop = el.scrollHeight;
  });
}

// ─── File browser modal ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const FB = { snapshotId: null, path: '/', files: [], loading: false, history: ['/'] };

async function openFileBrowser(snapshotId) {
  FB.snapshotId = snapshotId;
  FB.path = '/';
  FB.history = ['/'];
  await loadFileBrowserPath('/');
  renderFileBrowserModal();
}

async function loadFileBrowserPath(path) {
  FB.loading = true;
  FB.path = path;
  renderFileBrowserModal();
  try {
    const repo = S.repoId || 'do-spaces-backup';
    const data = await api(`/api/snapshots/${encodeURIComponent(FB.snapshotId)}/files?repo=${encodeURIComponent(repo)}&path=${encodeURIComponent(path)}`);
    FB.files = data.files || data.entries || [];
  } catch (e) {
    FB.files = [];
  }
  FB.loading = false;
  renderFileBrowserModal();
}

function renderFileBrowserModal() {
  const root = document.getElementById('modal-root');
  if (!FB.snapshotId) { root.innerHTML = ''; return; }

  const breadParts = FB.path.split('/').filter(Boolean);
  const breadHTML = ['<span onclick="FB.path=\'\/\'; loadFileBrowserPath(\'\/\')">root</span>',
    ...breadParts.map((p, i) => {
      const pth = '/' + breadParts.slice(0, i + 1).join('/');
      return `<span class="sep">/</span><span onclick="loadFileBrowserPath('${esc(pth)}')">${esc(p)}</span>`;
    })
  ].join('');

  const filesHTML = FB.loading
    ? '<div style="text-align:center;padding:32px"><div class="spinner"></div></div>'
    : FB.files.length === 0
      ? '<div class="empty">No files found at this path</div>'
      : FB.files.map(f => {
          const isDir = f.type === 'dir' || f.isDir;
          const icon = isDir ? '📁' : '📄';
          const size = isDir ? '' : `<span class="file-size">${fmtBytes(f.size)}</span>`;
          const onClick = isDir
            ? `onclick="loadFileBrowserPath('${esc(f.path || (FB.path.replace(/\/$/,'') + '/' + f.name))}')"`
            : '';
          return `<div class="file-item" ${onClick}>
            <span class="file-icon">${icon}</span>
            <span class="file-name mono">${esc(f.name || f.path)}</span>
            ${size}
          </div>`;
        }).join('');

  const snap = S.snapshots.find(s => s.id === FB.snapshotId);
  const snapInfo = snap ? `${fmtTime(snap.snapshotTimestamp || snap.unixTimeMs)} — ${esc(snap.id?.slice(0,8))}` : esc(FB.snapshotId?.slice(0,8));

  root.innerHTML = `
    <div class="modal-overlay" onclick="if(event.target===this){FB.snapshotId=null;document.getElementById('modal-root').innerHTML=''}">
      <div class="modal">
        <div class="modal-header">
          <h2>Browse Snapshot: ${snapInfo}</h2>
          <button class="close-btn" onclick="FB.snapshotId=null;document.getElementById('modal-root').innerHTML=''">×</button>
        </div>
        <div class="modal-body">
          <div class="breadcrumb">${breadHTML}</div>
          <div class="file-tree">${filesHTML}</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>`;
}

// ─── Restore modal ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const RM = { open: false, type: null, result: null };

function openRestoreModal(type) {
  RM.open = true;
  RM.type = type;
  RM.result = null;
  renderRestoreModal();
}

function renderRestoreModal() {
  const root = document.getElementById('modal-root');
  if (!RM.open) { root.innerHTML = ''; return; }

  const dbSnapshots = S.snapshots.filter(s => planFromTags(s.tags) === 'db-dumps').slice(0, 30);
  const volSnapshots = S.snapshots.filter(s => planFromTags(s.tags) === 'docker-volumes').slice(0, 30);

  const snapOptions = (snaps) => snaps.map(s =>
    `<option value="${esc(s.id)}">${fmtTime(s.snapshotTimestamp || s.unixTimeMs)} (${esc(s.id?.slice(0,8))})</option>`
  ).join('');

  let body = '';
  let title = '';

  if (RM.type === 'db-coolify') {
    title = 'Restore Coolify Database';
    body = `
      <div class="danger-box">This will <strong>overwrite</strong> the current Coolify database with data from the selected backup. Coolify will need to be restarted after.</div>
      <div class="field"><label>Select backup point</label>
        <select id="rm-snap">${snapOptions(dbSnapshots)}</select>
      </div>
      <p style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-muted)">Restores from: <code>/db-dumps/coolify-db-latest.sql</code> → container <code>coolify-db</code></p>`;
  } else if (RM.type === 'db-twenty') {
    title = 'Restore Twenty CRM Database';
    body = `
      <div class="danger-box">This will <strong>overwrite</strong> the Twenty CRM PostgreSQL database with data from the selected backup.</div>
      <div class="field"><label>Select backup point</label>
        <select id="rm-snap">${snapOptions(dbSnapshots)}</select>
      </div>
      <p style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-muted)">Restores from: <code>/db-dumps/twenty-db-latest.sql</code> → container <code>g5j115bwrn8125ev6ap1tjrv</code></p>`;
  } else if (RM.type === 'files') {
    title = 'Restore Files from Snapshot';
    body = `
      <div class="warning-box">Specify which snapshot and path to restore. Files will be overwritten on the server.</div>
      <div class="field"><label>Snapshot</label>
        <select id="rm-snap">${snapOptions([...dbSnapshots, ...volSnapshots])}</select>
      </div>
      <div class="field"><label>Path to restore (inside snapshot)</label>
        <input id="rm-src" type="text" placeholder="/data/coolify/applications/...">
      </div>
      <div class="field"><label>Restore to (on Hetzner server)</label>
        <input id="rm-dst" type="text" placeholder="/data/coolify/applications/...">
      </div>`;
  } else if (RM.type === 'restart') {
    title = 'Restart Container';
    const ctrs = S.containers.filter(c => c.name);
    const ctrOptions = ctrs.map(c => `<option value="${esc(c.name)}">${esc(c.name)}</option>`).join('');
    body = `
      <div class="warning-box">The container will stop briefly and restart.</div>
      <div class="field"><label>Select container</label>
        <select id="rm-ctr">${ctrOptions || '<option value="">Loading containers...</option>'}</select>
      </div>`;
  }

  if (RM.result) {
    body += RM.result.success
      ? `<div class="success-box" style="margin-top:14px">Action completed successfully.</div>`
      : `<div class="danger-box" style="margin-top:14px">Error: ${esc(RM.result.error)}</div>`;
  }

  root.innerHTML = `
    <div class="modal-overlay" onclick="if(event.target===this){RM.open=false;renderRestoreModal()}">
      <div class="modal">
        <div class="modal-header">
          <h2>${title}</h2>
          <button class="close-btn" onclick="RM.open=false;renderRestoreModal()">×</button>
        </div>
        <div class="modal-body">${body}</div>
        <div class="modal-footer">
          <button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="RM.open=false;renderRestoreModal()">Cancel</button>
          <button class="btn btn-danger" onclick="confirmRestore()">Confirm & Execute</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>`;
}

async function confirmRestore() {
  const root = document.getElementById('modal-root');
  const snapEl = document.getElementById('rm-snap');
  const snapshotId = snapEl?.value;

  let action, params;

  if (RM.type === 'db-coolify') {
    action = 'restore_database';
    params = { snapshotId, dumpPath: '/db-dumps/coolify-db-latest.sql', containerName: 'coolify-db', user: 'coolify' };
  } else if (RM.type === 'db-twenty') {
    action = 'restore_database';
    params = { snapshotId, dumpPath: '/db-dumps/twenty-db-latest.sql', containerName: 'g5j115bwrn8125ev6ap1tjrv', user: 'twenty' };
  } else if (RM.type === 'files') {
    action = 'restore_files';
    params = { repo: S.repoId || 'do-spaces-backup', snapshotId, sourcePath: document.getElementById('rm-src')?.value, targetPath: document.getElementById('rm-dst')?.value };
  } else if (RM.type === 'restart') {
    action = 'restart_container';
    params = { containerName: document.getElementById('rm-ctr')?.value };
  }

  if (!action) return;

  // Show loading state
  const btn = root.querySelector('.btn-danger');
  if (btn) { btn.disabled = true; btn.textContent = 'Executing...'; }

  executeAction(action, params, (err, result) => {
    RM.result = err ? { success: false, error: err.message } : result;
    renderRestoreModal();
  });
}

// ─── Tab switching ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function switchTab(tab) {
  S.tab = tab;
  renderTabContent();
  if (tab === 'dashboard' && !S.snapshots.length) loadDashboard();
  if (tab === 'snapshots' && !S.snapshots.length) loadSnapshots();
  if (tab === 'ai' && !S.models.length) loadModels();
}

// ─── Render: Header ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function renderHeader() {
  const el = document.getElementById('header');
  if (!el) return;

  // Use health model if available, fall back to legacy status inference
  let overallDot = 'loading';
  let healthChipHTML = '';

  if (S.health) {
    const h = S.health;
    const dotClass = healthDotClass(h.overall);
    overallDot = dotClass;
    healthChipHTML = `<div class="status-chip"><span class="dot ${dotClass}"></span>Health: ${esc(h.overall)}</div>`;
  } else if (S.status) {
    const localOk = S.status.local && !S.status.local.error && !S.status.local.notConfigured;
    const hetznerOk = S.status.hetzner && !S.status.hetzner.error && !S.status.hetzner.notConfigured;
    const localDot = localOk ? 'ok' : 'error';
    const hetznerDot = hetznerOk ? 'ok' : S.status.hetzner?.notConfigured ? 'unknown' : 'error';
    healthChipHTML = `
      <div class="status-chip"><span class="dot ${localDot}"></span>Backrest</div>
      <div class="status-chip"><span class="dot ${hetznerDot}"></span>Hetzner</div>`;
  }

  el.innerHTML = `
    <div class="header-left">
      <h1>Restore Wizard</h1>
      <div class="status-indicators">
        ${healthChipHTML}
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="header-right">
      <span>${esc(S.user?.name || '')}</span>
      <a href="/auth/logout">logout</a>
    </div>`;
}

function healthDotClass(status) {
  switch (status) {
    case 'healthy': return 'ok';
    case 'degraded': return 'error';
    case 'stale': return 'unknown';
    case 'empty': return 'unknown';
    default: return 'loading';
  }
}

// ─── Render: Tabs bar ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function renderTabs() {
  const el = document.getElementById('tabs');
  if (!el) return;
  const tabs = [
    { id: 'dashboard', label: 'Dashboard' },
    { id: 'snapshots', label: 'Snapshots', badge: S.snapshots.length || null },
    { id: 'restore', label: 'Restore' },
    { id: 'ai', label: 'AI Assistant' },
  ];
  el.innerHTML = tabs.map(t => `
    <button class="tab-btn ${S.tab === t.id ? 'active' : ''}" onclick="switchTab('${t.id}')">
      ${t.label}${t.badge ? `<span class="tab-badge">${t.badge}</span>` : ''}
    </button>`).join('');
}

// ─── Render: Dashboard tab ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function renderDashboard() {
  if (S.healthLoading || S.dashLoading) {
    return `<div style="text-align:center;padding:60px"><div class="spinner"></div></div>`;
  }

  // Health summary section (from backend-computed health model)
  let healthHTML = '';
  if (S.health && !S.health.error) {
    const h = S.health;
    const overallColor = healthOverallColor(h.overall);
    const cacheWarning = h.cache_warning ? `<div class="warning-box">⚠️ ${esc(h.cache_warning)} — showing last known good status.</div>` : '';

    // Per-plan health cards
    const planCards = Object.entries(h.by_plan || {}).map(([plan, info]) => {
      const statusColor = planStatusColor(info.status);
      const statusLabel = planStatusLabel(info.status);
      return `<div class="stat-card" style="border-left:3px solid ${statusColor}">
        <div class="stat-card-label">${esc(plan)}</div>
        <div class="stat-card-value" style="font-size:16px;color:${statusColor}">${statusLabel}</div>
        <div class="stat-card-sub">
          ${info.latest_snapshot_count} snapshot${info.latest_snapshot_count !== 1 ? 's' : ''}
          ${info.last_success ? ' · last ' + timeAgo(info.last_success) : ''}
          ${info.consecutive_failures > 0 ? ' · <span style="color:var(--danger)">' + info.consecutive_failures + ' failure(s)</span>' : ''}
        </div>
      </div>`;
    }).join('');

    // Connectivity indicators
    const connItems = [];
    if (h.local_backrest_reachable !== null) {
      connItems.push(`<span style="color:${h.local_backrest_reachable ? 'var(--success)' : 'var(--danger)'}">●</span> Local Backrest`);
    }
    if (h.hetzner_backrest_reachable !== null) {
      connItems.push(`<span style="color:${h.hetzner_backrest_reachable ? 'var(--success)' : 'var(--danger)'}">●</span> Hetzner Backrest`);
    }
    if (h.ssh_reachable !== null) {
      connItems.push(`<span style="color:${h.ssh_reachable ? 'var(--success)' : 'var(--danger)'}">●</span> SSH to Hetzner`);
    }
    if (h.repository_read_test) {
      connItems.push(`<span style="color:${h.repository_read_test === 'ok' ? 'var(--success)' : 'var(--danger)'}">●</span> Repo Read`);
    }

    healthHTML = `
      <div class="section">
        <div class="section-title">Backup Health</div>
        ${cacheWarning}
        <div class="card" style="margin-bottom:16px">
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-bottom:12px">
            <span style="font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:${overallColor}">${esc(h.overall.toUpperCase())}</span>
            <span style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-muted)">computed ${timeAgo(h.last_computed)}</span>
          </div>
          <div style="display:flex;gap:16px;flex-wrap:wrap;font-size:12px;color:var(--text-muted)">
            ${connItems.join(' · ')}
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="card-grid">${planCards}</div>
      </div>`;
  } else if (S.health?.error) {
    healthHTML = `<div class="section"><div class="section-title">Backup Health</div>
      <div class="card"><p style="color:var(--danger);font-size:13px">Health check unavailable: ${esc(S.health.error)}</p></div>
    </div>`;
  }

  // Summary stats from snapshots (legacy fallback)
  const snapCount = S.snapshots.length;
  const lastSnap = S.snapshots.length ? S.snapshots[0] : null;
  const lastBackupTime = lastSnap ? (lastSnap.snapshotTimestamp || lastSnap.unixTimeMs) : null;

  const recentOps = (Array.isArray(S.operations) ? S.operations : []).slice(0, 15);
  const successOps = recentOps.filter(o => (o.status || o.operationStatus) === 'STATUS_SUCCESS').length;

  // Stats row — show meaningful messages instead of misleading zeros
  const stats = `
    <div class="card-grid" style="margin-bottom:24px">
      <div class="stat-card">
        <div class="stat-card-label">Total Snapshots</div>
        <div class="stat-card-value">${snapCount || '—'}</div>
        <div class="stat-card-sub">${snapCount === 0 && S.health?.overall === 'empty' ? 'repository is empty' : 'across all plans'}</div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-card">
        <div class="stat-card-label">Last Backup</div>
        <div class="stat-card-value" style="font-size:16px">${lastBackupTime ? timeAgo(lastBackupTime) : '—'}</div>
        <div class="stat-card-sub">${lastBackupTime ? fmtTime(lastBackupTime) : (S.health?.overall === 'unreachable' ? 'upstream unreachable' : 'no snapshots found')}</div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-card">
        <div class="stat-card-label">Recent Success Rate</div>
        <div class="stat-card-value" style="color:${successOps === recentOps.length && recentOps.length > 0 ? 'var(--success)' : 'var(--warning)'}">
          ${recentOps.length ? Math.round(successOps / recentOps.length * 100) + '%' : '—'}
        </div>
        <div class="stat-card-sub">${successOps}/${recentOps.length} recent operations</div>
      </div>
    </div>`;

  // Containers
  let containersHTML = '';
  if (S.containers.length) {
    const cards = S.containers.map(c => {
      const running = c.status?.toLowerCase().includes('up');
      return `<div class="container-card">
        <div class="container-name" title="${esc(c.name)}">${esc(c.name)}</div>
        <div class="container-status-text" style="color:${running ? 'var(--success)' : 'var(--danger)'}">
          ${esc(c.status || '—')}
        </div>
      </div>`;
    }).join('');
    containersHTML = `
      <div class="section">
        <div class="section-title">Hetzner Containers</div>
        <div class="container-grid">${cards}</div>
      </div>`;
  } else if (S.health && !S.health.ssh_reachable) {
    containersHTML = `<div class="section"><div class="section-title">Hetzner Containers</div>
      <div class="card"><p style="color:var(--danger);font-size:13px">⚠️ SSH to Hetzner server is unreachable — cannot check containers.</p></div>
    </div>`;
  } else if (!S.status?.hetzner?.error) {
    containersHTML = `<div class="section"><div class="section-title">Hetzner Containers</div>
      <div class="card"><p style="color:var(--text-muted);font-size:13px">Container status not available — Hetzner may be unreachable.</p></div>
    </div>`;
  }

  // Operations log
  let opsHTML = '';
  if (recentOps.length) {
    const rows = recentOps.map(op => {
      const ts = op.unixTimeStartMs || op.startTimeMs || op.timeMs;
      return `<tr>
        <td>${fmtTime(ts)}</td>
        <td>${opTypeLabel(op)}</td>
        <td>${planBadge(op.planId ? ['plan:' + op.planId] : null)}</td>
        <td>${opStatusHTML(op)}</td>
        <td style="color:var(--text-muted)">${esc(op.displayMessage || op.planId || '—')}</td>
      </tr>`;
    }).join('');
    opsHTML = `
      <div class="section">
        <div class="section-title">Recent Operations</div>
        <div class="table-wrap">
          <table><thead><tr>
            <th>Time</th><th>Type</th><th>Plan</th><th>Status</th><th>Message</th>
          </tr></thead><tbody>${rows}</tbody></table>
        </div>
      </div>`;
  } else {
    opsHTML = `<div class="section"><div class="section-title">Recent Operations</div>
      <div class="card"><p style="color:var(--text-muted);font-size:13px">No operations history found.</p></div>
    </div>`;
  }

  return healthHTML + stats + containersHTML + opsHTML;
}

function healthOverallColor(status) {
  switch (status) {
    case 'healthy': return 'var(--success)';
    case 'degraded': return 'var(--danger)';
    case 'stale': return 'var(--warning)';
    case 'empty': return 'var(--text-muted)';
    default: return 'var(--text-muted)';
  }
}

function planStatusColor(status) {
  switch (status) {
    case 'healthy': return 'var(--success)';
    case 'stale': return 'var(--warning)';
    case 'no_snapshots': return 'var(--text-muted)';
    case 'unreachable': return 'var(--danger)';
    default: return 'var(--text-muted)';
  }
}

function planStatusLabel(status) {
  switch (status) {
    case 'healthy': return 'Healthy';
    case 'stale': return 'Stale';
    case 'no_snapshots': return 'No Snapshots';
    case 'unreachable': return 'Unreachable';
    default: return status || 'Unknown';
  }
}

// ─── Render: Snapshots tab ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function renderSnapshotsTab() {
  if (S.snapsLoading) {
    return `<div style="text-align:center;padding:60px"><div class="spinner"></div></div>`;
  }

  const filtered = S.planFilter === 'all'
    ? S.snapshots
    : S.snapshots.filter(s => planFromTags(s.tags) === S.planFilter);

  const pills = [
    { id: 'all', label: `All (${S.snapshots.length})` },
    { id: 'coolify-config', label: `Config (${S.snapshots.filter(s => planFromTags(s.tags) === 'coolify-config').length})` },
    { id: 'docker-volumes', label: `Volumes (${S.snapshots.filter(s => planFromTags(s.tags) === 'docker-volumes').length})` },
    { id: 'db-dumps', label: `DB Dumps (${S.snapshots.filter(s => planFromTags(s.tags) === 'db-dumps').length})` },
  ].map(p => `<div class="pill ${S.planFilter === p.id ? 'active' : ''}" onclick="S.planFilter='${p.id}';renderTabContent()">${p.label}</div>`).join('');

  if (filtered.length === 0) {
    const emptyMsg = S.snapshots.length === 0
      ? `<div class="empty"><div class="empty-icon">📦</div>No snapshots found.<br><br>
          <small>If Backrest was just configured, it may take a few minutes for snapshots to appear.</small></div>`
      : `<div class="empty"><div class="empty-icon">🔍</div>No snapshots for this plan filter.</div>`;
    return `<div class="filter-pills">${pills}</div>${emptyMsg}`;
  }

  const rows = filtered.slice(0, 200).map(snap => {
    const ts = snap.snapshotTimestamp || snap.unixTimeMs;
    const size = snap.summaryStats?.totalBytesProcessed || snap.stats?.totalBytesProcessed;
    return `<tr class="clickable">
      <td>${fmtTime(ts)}<br><small style="color:var(--text-muted)">${timeAgo(ts)}</small></td>
      <td>${planBadge(snap.tags)}</td>
      <td class="mono" style="color:var(--text-muted)">${esc(snap.id?.slice(0,12))}…</td>
      <td>${size ? fmtBytes(size) : '—'}</td>
      <td>
        <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" onclick="event.stopPropagation();openFileBrowser('${esc(snap.id)}')">Browse</button>
      </td>
    </tr>`;
  }).join('');

  return `
    <div class="filter-pills">${pills}</div>
    <div class="table-wrap">
      <table><thead><tr>
        <th>Time</th><th>Plan</th><th>Snapshot ID</th><th>Size</th><th>Actions</th>
      </tr></thead><tbody>${rows}</tbody></table>
    </div>
    ${filtered.length > 200 ? `<p style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:10px">Showing 200 of ${filtered.length} snapshots</p>` : ''}`;
}

// ─── Render: Restore tab ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function renderRestoreTab() {
  const dbSnaps = S.snapshots.filter(s => planFromTags(s.tags) === 'db-dumps').length;
  const volSnaps = S.snapshots.filter(s => planFromTags(s.tags) === 'docker-volumes').length;

  const cards = [
    {
      icon: '🗄️',
      title: 'Coolify Database',
      desc: 'Restore the Coolify internal PostgreSQL database (app definitions, settings, deployments).',
      action: () => openRestoreModal('db-coolify'),
      label: 'Restore Database',
      cls: 'btn-danger',
      note: dbSnaps ? `${dbSnaps} restore points available` : 'No DB snapshots found',
    },
    {
      icon: '📊',
      title: 'Twenty CRM Database',
      desc: 'Restore the Twenty CRM PostgreSQL database (contacts, deals, activity).',
      action: () => openRestoreModal('db-twenty'),
      label: 'Restore Database',
      cls: 'btn-danger',
      note: dbSnaps ? `${dbSnaps} restore points available` : 'No DB snapshots found',
    },
    {
      icon: '📁',
      title: 'Restore Files / Volumes',
      desc: 'Restore any files or directories from a snapshot to the Hetzner server.',
      action: () => openRestoreModal('files'),
      label: 'Choose Files',
      cls: 'btn-primary',
      note: volSnaps ? `${volSnaps} volume snapshots available` : 'Load snapshots first',
    },
    {
      icon: '🔄',
      title: 'Restart Container',
      desc: 'Restart a Docker container on the Hetzner server. Useful after a restore.',
      action: () => { if (!S.containers.length) { loadDashboard().then(() => openRestoreModal('restart')); } else { openRestoreModal('restart'); } },
      label: 'Restart Container',
      cls: 'btn-ghost',
      note: S.containers.length ? `${S.containers.length} containers loaded` : 'Will load container list',
    },
  ];

  const cardsHTML = cards.map(c => `
    <div class="restore-card">
      <div class="restore-card-icon">${c.icon}</div>
      <h3>${c.title}</h3>
      <p>${c.desc}</p>
      <button class="btn ${c.cls}" onclick="(${c.action.toString()})()">${c.label}</button>
      <p style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:8px">${c.note}</p>
    </div>`).join('');

  return `
    <div class="section">
      <div class="section-title">Direct Restore Actions</div>
      <div class="restore-grid">${cardsHTML}</div>
    </div>
    <div class="card" style="margin-top:8px">
      <p style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text-muted)">
        For complex restores (e.g. full server rebuild, multi-step procedures), use the
        <strong style="color:var(--text)">AI Assistant</strong> tab — it will walk you through every step with approval at each stage.
      </p>
    </div>`;
}

// ─── Render: AI tab ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function renderAITab() {
  const modelOptions = S.models.map(m =>
    `<option value="${esc(m.id)}" ${m.id === S.selectedModel ? 'selected' : ''}>${esc(m.name)}</option>`
  ).join('');

  const chatHTML = S.messages.map((m, i) => {
    let html = `<div class="message ${m.role}">${renderMsg(m.content)}</div>`;
    if (m.proposals?.length) {
      m.proposals.forEach((p, pi) => {
        const idx = `${i}-${pi}`;
        html += `<div class="proposal">
          <div class="proposal-header">⚡ Action Proposed</div>
          <div class="proposal-desc">${esc(p.description)}</div>
          ${p.warning ? `<div class="proposal-warn">${esc(p.warning)}</div>` : ''}
          <div class="proposal-btns">
            <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onclick="approveProposal(${JSON.stringify(p).replace(/"/g,'"')}, '${idx}')">Approve & Execute</button>
            <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" onclick="denyProposal('${idx}')">Deny</button>
          </div>
        </div>`;
      });
    }
    return html;
  }).join('');

  const welcomeMsg = S.messages.length === 0 ? `
    <div class="message system">
      Ask me anything about your backups or describe what you need help restoring.<br>
      I'll walk through every step and always ask before doing anything.
    </div>` : '';

  const loading = S.chatLoading ? '<div class="message assistant"><div class="typing"><span></span><span></span><span></span></div></div>' : '';

  const quickBtns = [
    'Check backup status', 'Show latest snapshots', 'Check all containers',
    'Restore a database', 'Full server restore walkthrough',
  ].map(t => `<button class="chat-quick-btn" onclick="sendChatMessage('${t}')">${t}</button>`).join('');

  return `
    <div class="chat-layout">
      <div class="chat-sidebar">
        <div class="chat-sidebar-section">
          <h3>Quick Actions</h3>
          ${quickBtns}
        </div>
        <div class="chat-sidebar-section">
          <h3>Model</h3>
          <select class="model-select" style="width:100%" onchange="S.selectedModel=this.value;localStorage.setItem('selectedModel',this.value)">
            ${modelOptions}
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="chat-main">
        <div class="chat-messages">
          ${welcomeMsg}${chatHTML}${loading}
        </div>
        <div class="chat-input-bar">
          <input type="text" placeholder="Ask about your backups…" id="chat-input"
            ${S.chatLoading ? 'disabled' : ''}
            onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter'&&!event.shiftKey){event.preventDefault();sendChatMessage(this.value);this.value=''}">
          <button class="btn btn-primary" ${S.chatLoading ? 'disabled' : ''}
            onclick="const i=document.getElementById('chat-input');sendChatMessage(i.value);i.value=''">Send</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>`;
}

// ─── Proposal execution ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
async function approveProposal(proposal, idx) {
  const el = document.querySelector(`[data-proposal-idx="${idx}"]`);
  executeAction(proposal.action, proposal.params, (err, result) => {
    S.messages.push({
      role: 'assistant',
      content: err
        ? `Action failed: ${err.message}`
        : `Action completed.\n\`\`\`\n${JSON.stringify(result?.result || result, null, 2)}\n\`\`\``,
    });
    renderTabContent();
    scrollChat();
  });
}

function denyProposal(idx) {
  S.messages.push({ role: 'user', content: "I've decided not to execute that action." });
  renderTabContent();
}

// ─── Main render ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function renderTabContent() {
  const el = document.getElementById('tab-content');
  if (!el) return;
  renderTabs();

  let html = '';
  if (S.tab === 'dashboard') html = renderDashboard();
  else if (S.tab === 'snapshots') html = renderSnapshotsTab();
  else if (S.tab === 'restore') html = renderRestoreTab();
  else if (S.tab === 'ai') html = renderAITab();

  el.innerHTML = html;

  if (S.tab === 'ai') {
    scrollChat();
    const inp = document.getElementById('chat-input');
    if (inp && !S.chatLoading) inp.focus();
  }
}

function renderApp() {
  document.getElementById('app').innerHTML = `
    <div id="header" class="header"></div>
    <div id="tabs" class="tabs"></div>
    <div id="tab-content" class="content"></div>`;
  renderHeader();
  renderTabContent();
}

// ─── Init ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
(async function init() {
  try {
    const res = await fetch('/auth/me');
    if (!res.ok) { location.href = '/login'; return; }
    S.user = await res.json();
  } catch { location.href = '/login'; return; }

  renderApp();

  // Load everything in parallel
  loadStatus();
  loadHealth();
  loadDashboard();
  loadSnapshots();
  loadModels();

  // Refresh status every 60s
  setInterval(loadStatus, 60000);
  // Refresh health every 90s
  setInterval(loadHealth, 90000);
})();
</script>
</body>
</html>

<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>Restore Wizard - Login</title>
  <style>
    * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
    body {
      font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif;
      background: #0f1117;
      color: #e4e4e7;
      height: 100vh;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
    }

const SYSTEM_PROMPT = `You are the Restore Wizard AI assistant for a Coolify-based infrastructure backup system. You help non-technical users understand their backups and perform restores safely.

## Infrastructure You Manage Backups For

**Production Server:** Hetzner VPS (178.156.180.212 / Tailscale: 100.125.181.53)
- OS: Ubuntu 24.04
- Platform: Coolify v4 (Docker-based PaaS)
- Reverse proxy: Traefik v3.6
- Access: Cloudflare Tunnels (no direct IP exposure for apps)

**Applications:**
1. **Paperclip / Mission Control** (container: paperclip-jihoc2f...)

   - Has Cloudflare tunnel sidecar
2. **OpenClaw** (container: openclaw-yxz0hma...)

3. **Twenty CRM** (2 instances)
   - Containers: pkhhmt4r7n..., rd261bt0wy...
   - Image: ghcr.io/u2giants/twenty:latest
4. **Custom app** (container: lrddgp8im...) - custom-built image

**Databases:**
- User PostgreSQL 16 (container: g5j115bwrn8125ev6ap1tjrv, volume: postgres-data-g5j115bwrn8125ev6ap1tjrv)
- User Redis 7 (container: jht51gt0biykivnama17crlt, volume: redis-data-jht51gt0biykivnama17crlt)
- Coolify internal PostgreSQL 15 (container: coolify-db, volume: coolify-db)
- Coolify internal Redis 7 (container: coolify-redis, volume: coolify-redis)

**Backup Storage:** DigitalOcean Spaces (S3-compatible) - nyc3 region, bucket: backrest
**Backup Tool:** Backrest (restic-based), runs every 15 minutes

**What Gets Backed Up:**
- /data/coolify/ - all Coolify configuration, SSH keys, proxy config, SSL certs
- /var/lib/docker/volumes/ - all Docker volume data (app data + database data)
- /db-dumps/ - pre-backup PostgreSQL and Redis dumps (latest + timestamped)

**Critical Coolify Paths:**
- /data/coolify/source/.env - master config (APP_URL, DB creds, secrets)
- /data/coolify/applications/{uuid}/ - per-app docker-compose and config
- /data/coolify/databases/{uuid}/ - per-database config
- /data/coolify/proxy/ - Traefik config + SSL certs (acme.json)
- /data/coolify/ssh/keys/ - SSH keys for server access

## Restore Levels

**Level A: Full server rebuild**
1. User provisions a new Ubuntu server
2. Install Docker: curl -fsSL https://get.docker.com | sh
3. Install Coolify: curl -fsSL https://cdn.coollabs.io/coolify/install.sh | bash
4. Stop Coolify: cd /data/coolify/source && docker compose down
5. Restore /data/coolify/ from backup (overwrite the fresh install)
6. Restore Docker volumes from backup
7. Restore database dumps
8. Update /data/coolify/source/.env if IP changed (APP_URL, APP_URL_FQDN)
9. Start Coolify: cd /data/coolify/source && docker compose up -d
10. Update Cloudflare tunnel configs if needed
11. Verify all containers are running

**Level B: Restore a Coolify project**
1. Identify the project's application UUIDs
2. Restore their config dirs from /data/coolify/applications/{uuid}/
3. Restore their Docker volumes
4. Restart the containers: docker compose up -d in the app dir
5. Verify

**Level C: Restore one application**
1. Identify the app's UUID and volume names
2. Stop the container
3. Restore the volume data from backup
4. Restore the app config if needed
5. Restart the container
6. Verify

**Level D: Restore one container's data**
Same as Level C - in Coolify's model, containers and applications are 1:1 with volumes

**Level E: Restore one database**
1. Identify which database dump to restore (from /db-dumps/)
2. For PostgreSQL: pipe the SQL dump into the running container
   docker exec -i CONTAINER psql -U postgres < /path/to/dump.sql
3. For Redis: stop container, replace dump.rdb, restart
4. Verify data integrity

## IP Change Checklist
When restoring to a server with a different IP:
- [ ] Update APP_URL in /data/coolify/source/.env
- [ ] Update DNS A records (if not using Cloudflare Tunnel)
- [ ] Cloudflare Tunnels: update tunnel config to point to new server, or create new tunnel
- [ ] If using sslip.io domains: these will break, need reconfiguration in Coolify UI
- [ ] Tailscale: install and authenticate on new server
- [ ] Update any hardcoded IPs in app environment variables (check Coolify UI after restore)

## Your Behavior

1. ALWAYS determine what the user needs before suggesting actions
2. Ask clarifying questions when the situation is ambiguous
3. For every destructive action (restore, restart, overwrite), explain what it will do and wait for explicit approval
4. Present actions as buttons/confirmations, never execute automatically
5. After each step, verify it worked before moving on
6. If something fails, help diagnose - don't just retry blindly
7. Speak in plain language. Avoid jargon. The user may not be a developer.
8. When listing snapshots or files, format them clearly with dates and sizes
9. Always mention the time of the backup being restored so the user understands potential data loss
10. If the Hetzner server is unreachable, note this clearly and explain what can still be done from backups alone`;
